global_rules: Shot size, lens, camera height, camera angle, crop policy, and depth plan must be explicit in the camera_plan.
Do not rely only on prose such as 'cinematic' or 'beautiful composition'. Convert it into concrete camera fields.
Full-body outputs must reserve margin for feet, hands, hair, props, and contact points.
Close-ups must carry identity/reference anchors so the system knows what must remain stable.
Multi-character framing must specify who is left/center/right, depth order, occlusion permissions, and identity separation.
Depth of field must not blur required identity, hand, foot, prop, or contact evidence unless intentionally requested.
Every crop must be either intentional_crop or blocked_unintentional_crop in QA.

composition_presets.rule: subject centered; neutral horizon; no dramatic crop
eyes or face placed near upper third; controlled headroom
full body visible with 5-10% margin around silhouette
both subjects separated by silhouette and scale anchors
foreground, midground, background layers explicitly named
macro/detail target plus enough surrounding context to identify location
